speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye
text: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye maine apni asli pehchaan ko andar hi dafan kar diya hai. Sasu-maa ki dekhbhaal mein itni thak gayi thi ki main apni purani partner ki shaadi mein nahi ja paayi, par unke samne dukh chhupakar bas 'thakan' ka bahana banaya. Main unhe apni sacchai bata kar joint family ki izzat mitti mein nahi mila sakti, isliye bas ek ideal bahu bani rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational conflict between protecting the family's honor and hiding her true self.
text: Ghar ki shanti aur bado ke samman ko barkarar rakhne ke khaatir, aapne apne sabse gehre dukh aur apni sacchai ko poori tarah se chhupa liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine kuch bhi bola toh ghar ka poora mahaul kharab ho jayega. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye mujhe apne andar ke is rone ko chupana hi padta hai. Partner ki shaadi ke din main andar se toot rahi thi, par bahar se sasu-maa ko dawai de rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of the family environment breaking if she speaks up.
text: Aapke man mein ye ghabrahat baithi hai ki aapke ek lafz se poore ghar ka daancha bikhar jayega, jiske darr se aap apni takleef akele jhel rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar rishtedaron ko pata chala ki unki bahu ka past ek ladki ke sath tha, toh socho log kya kahenge? Mere sasural walon ka toh society mein mooh dikhane layak nahi rahega. Ye soch ke hi meri saans atak jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter restatement, using Lens D, ending with a soft pause.
text: Itne lambe samay se samaaj ke in taanon ke darr ko apne andar daba kar rakhna sach mein bahut bhari lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye
text: Bohot bhari hai. Subah se lekar raat tak joint family ka khana, sasu-maa ki sewa, sab kuch karna padta hai. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye maine literally apne aap ko ek machine bana liya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the explicit role she plays as a caregiver and ideal bahu.
text: Ek adarsh bahu ki rozmarra ki zimmedariyan nibhate nibhate aapne apni saari bhawnaon ko us kaam ke bojh ke neeche dabane ki aadat daal li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Option hi kya hai mere paas? Main unhe dukh nahi dena chahti. Unhone mujhe beti ki tarah rakha hai, par meri identity aisi hai jo unke samaj mein fit nahi hoti. Isliye main kuch bolti hi nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question to explore how she copes with this ongoing silence and suppression.
text: Jab yeh chup rehne ka aur sach chhupane ka bojh bahut badh jata hai, tab aap khud ko akele mein kaise sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ideal bahu bani rehti hoon
text: Bas washroom mein jaakar thoda ro leti hoon aur phir aakar bol deti hoon ki aaj sardi ki wajah se sir dukh raha hai ya phir kaam ki thakan hai. Uske baad wapas bahar aake wahi ideal bahu bani rehti hoon sabke samne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to highlight how she masks her deep emotional pain as simple physical exhaustion to protect others.
text: Apno ke beech rehte hue bhi, unki khushi aur izzat banaye rakhne ke liye aap apne itne gehre aasuon ko bas ek aam thakan ka naam de deti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... sach mein ek dohari zindagi jee rahi hoon main. Ek taraf sabka dhyan rakhna, aur doosri taraf andar hi andar akeli mehsoos karna. Aisa lagta hai jaise is bhare poore ghar mein mera apna koi wajood hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of ISOLATION tied to her hidden queer identity and role in the family.
text: Lagta hai is bhare poore joint family ke beech, ek perfect bahu banne ki is koshish ne aapko ek gehre ISOLATION mein daal diya hai, jahan aap poori tarah akeli pad gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne mere man ki baat padh li. Ye akelapan andar se khaa raha hai mujhe. Shaadi ke baad se mera puraana circle bhi choot gaya, aur yahan meri sachai ko samajhne wala ek insaan nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her isolation as a structural reality of the patriarchal joint family and 'log kya kahenge' culture.
text: Aapka ye akelapan mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Humare samaj mein 'log kya kahenge' aur izzat ka bojh itna zyada hota hai ki auraton ko apni pehchaan aur rishte chhipane padte hain, par iska matlab ye nahi ki aapka sach ya aapki feelings galat hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi mujhe lagta hai jaise main in sabke sath dhokha kar rahi hoon. Pati acche hain, sasu-maa bhi seedhi hain... darr lagta hai ki agar unhe pata laga toh unpar kya beetegi. Mere jaisi aurat ke paas izzat ke alawa kya bachta hai society mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote from her world to normalize the identity conflict in traditional families.
text: Joint family setups mein apni asli identity daba kar jeene ka ye pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin iske baare mein koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka hawala dekar aisi sabhi awazon ko daba diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi darr hai. Har waqt dil mein ghabrahat bani rehti hai ki kahin kisi din mere phone pe koi purani photo na dekh le, ya koi galti se bhi kuch bol na de. Main kisi ka bhi nuksaan nahi chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the constant anxiety of accidental discovery.
text: Bina kisi ki galti hue unka dil tootne ka ye dar aapko har choti choti baat par aur bhi zyada satark rehne ke liye majboor kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Satark rehna toh theek hai, par ab sehn kshamata jawab de rahi hai. Main theek hona chahti hoon is ghutan se. Ab kya karoon? Koi raasta hai kya is chup-chap rone se thodi bahut rahat paane ka, bina ghar walon ko kuch bataye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, culturally safe options that fit into her duties as a homemaker.
text: Aapke paas do chhote kadam ho sakte hain: Pehla, din mein jab sab aaram kar rahe hon toh sirf 10 minute kisi personal online diary ya app mein apne jazbaat likhein aur phir use lock kar dein. Doosra, phone par koi anonymous online support forum join karna jahan aap bina apna naam bataye logo se baat kar sakein. Aapko inme se kya karna mumkin lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Anonymous forum wala idea mujhe bohot safe lag raha hai. Dupehar mein jab sasu-maa so jati hain aur baki log apne apne kamo mein hote hain, tab main phone toh chala hi sakti hoon bina kisi shak ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through setting up the anonymous forum account.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaj dupehar ko jab sab so rahe hon, toh phone par ek safe anonymous LGBTQ forum search karo... phir wahan ek fake naam se chhota sa account bana lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main yeh kar sakti hoon. Isse kisi ko kano-kaan khabar nahi hogi aur kam se kam mujhe aise kisi insaan se baat karne ka mauka milega jo meri situation samajh sake. Izzat bhi bachi rahegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the anonymous space as a structural shield in a rigid culture.
text: Humari culture mein 'ideal bahu' aur parivaar ke niyam itne sakt hote hain ki apne dukh zahir karna almost namumkin lagta hai, isliye ek anonymous space ek bahut zaroori structural tool ban jata hai jahan aap bina darre saans le sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye
text: Sahi baat boli aapne. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main khud ki khushi toh kurban kar chuki thi, par shayad ab ek chota sa hissa meri apni marzi ka bhi ho sakta hai is secret space mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her finding a balance between family duty and personal space.
text: Sabki dekhbhaal aur parivaar ki ummeedon ke beech, bina kisi ko naraaz kiye, aapne finally khud ke liye ek halka sa sukoon dhoondh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot dino baad man me thodi shanti mehsoos ho rahi hai. Sach kahoon toh partner ki shaadi ka dukh abhi bhi hai, lekin us dukh ke bojh ko ab utna akele nahi dhona padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the easing of the long-term burden.
text: Bahut waqt baad aaj pehli baar aapko apne is lambe akelepan ke safar mein thodi si narmi dikhayi di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Aur sabse badi baat mujhe ab ye samajh aa gaya ki main joint family mein rehte hue bhi choti si hi sahi, par apni space create kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resourcefulness and strength in managing the joint family dynamic.
text: Ye baat sun kar sach mein badi tasalli hui. Aapki is thodi si himmat aur samajhdaari ne dikha diya ki sasural aur ghar ki zimmedari ke bawajood aapke andar apni jagah banane ki badi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Main poori zindagi sochti thi ki main ek gunehgar hoon, par aaj aapse baat karke laga ki main bas majboor hoon, aur majboori me raste nikal sakte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the dissolution of her fear of being a bad person.
text: Aapne jo khud ko ek gunehgar samajh rakha tha, aaj achanak se us galatfehmi aur us darr ki deewar toot gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bahut accha mehsoos ho raha hai. Ab sasu-maa ke uthne ka time ho raha hai, toh main jaakar unke sham ki chai ki tayari kar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to gently reflect her returning to her homemaking role but with a lighter heart.
text: Apne mann ko thoda halka karne ke baad, ab aap phir se apni bahu ki zimmedariyan poori karne ke liye us taraf laut rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ji. Lekin aaj thakan wali feeling nahi hai. Main apna khayal rakhungi, aur dupehar me woh account bhi banaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational shift, showing she is now in the relationship without losing herself completely.
text: Apni sacchai baantne ke baad, ab aap un rishton ko pehle jaisi ghutan ke bina aur ek nayi umeed ke saath nibhaane ja rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Bahut bojh halka hua mera aaj. Aap bhi apna dhyan rakhiyega, Namaste.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm sign-off recognizing her resilience.
text: Namaste, aap bhi apna poora dhyan rakhiyega. Jis tarah se aapne aaj apne liye ek naya rasta nikala hai, wahi aapki aage ki taqat banega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho
text: Caregiving aur ghar ke kaamon ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main us shaadi mein nahi ja saki jahan mujhe thoda sukoon milta, aur ab sab mujh par bacche ke liye pressure daal rahe hain. Agar maine apni LGBTQ identity reveal ki toh sasural mein sabka sar jhuk jayega aur Papa ki parvarish par sawal uthenge. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect the relational sacrifice of hiding her identity to protect her father and in-laws.
text: Apne Papa aur sasural walon ki izzat bachane aur rishton ko tootne se rokne ke liye, tum khud ko ek aisi ghutan bhari zindagi mein qaid kar rahi ho jo tumhari sacchai nahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho
text: Haan, aur ab yeh child pressure mujhe maar raha hai. Pata nahi kab tak yeh jhooth chalega. Agar bata diya toh kahenge isme 'khot' hai. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of being blamed and destroying the family honor.
text: Tumhare dil ke kisi kone mein yeh khauf baitha hai ki jis din sach bahar aayega, us din sabkuch bikhar jayega aur saari ungliyan tumhari parvarish par uthengi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Meri mummy-papa ne mujhe bahut pyar se bada kiya. Agar mere gay hone ki baat sasural ko pata chali toh meri family ka sar jhuk jayega aur samaj jeene nahi dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the ongoing weight of hiding this secret over time.
text: Itne salon se is raaz ko apne andar dabaye rakhna aur har din sabke taano se bachna kitna bhari aur thaka dene wala lagta hoga na...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho
text: Bahut bhari. Caregiving aur rasoi ke kamo se waqt milta toh sochti, par ab toh khud ke liye ek second nahi bacha. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore how she internally manages the pressure of both duties and the secret.
text: Jab yeh sara bojh aur bacche ka pressure ek sath aata hai, tab tum andar ke is darr aur ghutan ko akele kaise bardaasht karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas chup ho jati hoon. Kitchen mein akele aansu baha leti hoon taaki saas ya pati ko pata na chale. Pata hai, is bhare poore sasural mein mera dard samajhne wala ek bhi shaks nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of ISOLATION (C6 + Relational Preservation).
text: Lagta hai sabka khayal rakhte rakhte aur is sach ko chupate hue tum ek bahut gehre isolation mein chali gayi ho, jahan koi tumhari asliyat aur akelepan ko dekhne wala nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Sab mujhe ek adarsh bahu samajhte hain aur mujhe waisa banna padta hai. This double life is eating me from inside. Mujhe lagta hai meri apni koi aukaat hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the isolation as a natural response to the systemic pressure on married women to preserve honor.
text: Aise samaaj mein jahan bahu se sirf tyaag aur chup rehne ki umeed ki jati hai, wahan apne parivaar ko bachane ke liye asliyat chupana ek survival ban jata hai, aur tumhara akelapan is mahaul mein bilkul laazmi hai—par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum is ghutan ki hi haqdaar ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho
text: Aapki baatein sunkar thoda sahara laga. Mujhe laga tha shaadi ke baad sab theek ho jayega, par ab yeh bacche wala issue. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho, lekin bacche ko toh is natak mein nahi la sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the conflict between fulfilling the role of a daughter-in-law and the boundary of bringing a child into it.
text: Ek achi bahu aur patni ka farz poora karte karte, tum is naye bache ke farz se ghabra rahi ho kyunki tum ek aur maasoom zindagi ko is jhooth ka hissa nahi banana chahti...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul! Agar baccha ho gaya toh main is rishte mein hamesha ke liye qaid ho jaungi aur kisi din sach nikla toh us bacche ka kya hoga? Par mana bhi kaise karu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote about married LGBTQ women navigating family pressure in conservative settings.
text: Humaare samaj mein, khas taur par shaadi-shuda auraton ke liye, sasural ki izzat ki wajah se apni asli LGBTQ identity chupana aur zabardasti ki life jeena bahut common hai—sirf tumhara akele ka dukh nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samajik 'kalesh' ka bojh humesha aurat par hi dala jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, saara dosh mujh par hi aayega agar kuch hua toh. Par ab main kya karoon? Mujhe is bache wale pressure se thoda waqt chahiye, batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-stakes suggestions to delay the child pressure and find small pockets of support.
text: Do aasaan cheezein soch sakte hain: Pehla, kya tum kisi health reason ya 'doctor ne abhi body ko rest lene bola hai' ka bahana de kar bacche ki baat ko 6 mahine delay kar sakti ho? Ya doosra, kya din mein 10 minute akele kisi anonymous online queer forum par apne jaise logon ke experiences padhne ka waqt nikal sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Medical wala bahana shayad kaam kar jaye. Meri saas waise bhi meri thakan ko lekar tokte rehti hain. Agar main bolu ki kamzori bahut hai aur doctor ne mana kiya hai, toh shayad woh thode din shanti rakhein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the suggestion of delaying the pressure safely.
text: Pehle agli baar jab bacche ki baat chhide toh aram se apni thakan aur doctor ki advice ka zikr karna... phir is topic ko bina behes ke wahin chhod dena... bas itna hi koshish karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho
text: Try karti hoon. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho, toh delay karne ke liye ek aur chota natak hi sahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her preserving peace while buying herself time.
text: Rishton ko aur sasural ki shanti ko bachaye rakhne ke tarike nikalte hue, tumne apne liye thoda sa waqt aur chain dhoondhne ka socha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thoda waqt mil jayega toh main aage ka soch paungi. Abhi toh caregiving ne hi halat kharab kar rakhi hai, body mein bilkul jaan nahi bachti raat tak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe normalizing the caregiving burden as structural.
text: Bahuon par akele caregiving aur parivaar ko aage badhane ka pressure dalna hamare yahan ek structural expectation hai, yeh koi aisi cheez nahi jisme tum kamzor pad rahi ho, balki ek purana system hai jo auraton ko thaka deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: System ne toh sach mein daba diya hai hume. Main kab tak yeh pressure jhel paungi pata nahi, par abhi thoda breathing space chahiye mujhe urgently.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the overwhelming nature of the long term versus the immediate need to breathe.
text: Aane wale lamba samay kaisa hoga yeh sochna abhi ghabrahat deta hai, isliye is ghutan mein abhi tum sirf thodi si saans lene ki jagah maang rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Just trying to survive day by day. Agar main jyada dur ka sochungi toh shayad main breakdown ho jaungi aur kalesh shuru ho jayega ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her resilience in surviving day by day without causing conflict.
text: Har roz is dar aur thakan ke beech ek naya din shanti se kaatna aasaan nahi hota, par tum jis samajhdari aur himmat se ghar sambhal rahi ho, woh waqai kabile tareef hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Mujhe aapse baat karke lag raha hai ki main koi buri insaan nahi hoon. Mujhe humesha lagta tha main family ko dhokha de rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the fear of being inherently wrong or bad.
text: Dil ke ek hisse mein jo darr tha ki shayad tumhi galat ho aur sabko dhoka de rahi ho, woh bojh ab thoda halka mehsoos hone laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho
text: Han, thoda halka feel ho raha hai. Unka maan rakhne ke liye main har din ek natak jee rahi hoon taaki rishton mein koi doori na aaye aur kalesh na ho, lekin kam se kam meri apni feelings bhi important hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight her recognizing her own validity while still managing her roles.
text: Parivaar ke liye apni duty poori karte karte, aaj shayad pehli baar tumne apne andar ki aawaz aur zaruraton ko bhi utna hi sach maana hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I did. Main ab health checkup wala reason karke baat dalne pe dhyan dungi. Isse Papa ki parvarish pe koi aanch nahi aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her relief that the relational bonds and her father's honor remain safe.
text: Tumhare Papa ke samman ko aur rishton ko mahfuz rakhne ki tumhari chinta is naye kadam se thodi aasaan lagne lagi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Shaam ka khana banane ka waqt ho gaya hai. Sab intzaar kar rahe honge mera rasoi mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to transition into her ongoing daily routine.
text: Phir se wahi ghar ka routine aur zimmedariyon ka waqt shuru hone wala hai jahan tum sabka dhyan rakhti ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, routine wahi rahega par aaj main thodi mentally strong feel kar rahi hoon is routine ko face karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her newfound mental strength as she returns to her duties.
text: Tumhari yeh nayi soch aur khud ko sambhalne ki takat aage aane wale waqt aur roz ki thakan ko thoda zaroor aasaan banayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bhi yahi dua karti hoon. Aapka bahut bahut shukriya mujhe bina judge kiye sunne ke liye. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her stepping out of isolation to trust the Supporter.
text: Apne akelepan se nikal kar apni baatein aur bharosa yahan share karne ke liye shukriya, apna aache se khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas muskurati rehti hoon
text: Joint family ki maryada bachane ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai aur ab wedding miss hone par bhi bas muskurati rehti hoon. Main apni sacchai batane ki himmat nahi juta sakti kyunki hamare samaj mein ye 'paap' mana jata hai aur main nahi chahti ki mere bacche par koi aanch aaye. Khandaan ki shaan bani rahe, bas isi liye main apni suppressed identity kisi ko nahi dikhati aur chupchap seva karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice being made to maintain family honor.
text: Aapke is khandaan ki maryada aur rishton ko bachane ke khaatir, aapne apne aap ko puri tarah bhula diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ghar mein saas-sasur, devar-devrani sab hain. Sabko lagta hai main bahot khush kismat hoon, par andar se dum ghutta hai. Kisi ko mera asli roop nahi pata. Main auraton ki taraf aakarshit hoti hoon, par ye baat main zubaan par nahi la sakti. Agar bol diya toh tufaan aa jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a soft, shorter restatement of the feared consequence without asking a question.
text: Baccho ki suraksha ke darr aur parivaar ki vajah se, aapne is sach ko ek gehre raaz mein badal diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas muskurati rehti hoon
text: Bilkul. Ye samaj is chiz ko ek beemari ya paap samajhta hai. Main raat-raat bhar sochti hoon ki kya main sach mein galat hoon? Subah uth kar wahi saas ki sewa, rasoi ka kaam shuru kar deti hoon, aur apne andar ke dukh ko chupakar bas muskurati rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the daily duty frame under which her pain is buried.
text: Sabki dekhbhal karne ke is rozana farz ke peeche, ek bohot gehri ghutan chupi hai jise aap roz akele hi bardasht kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akelepan ka toh puchiye hi mat. Mere pati toh bas apne kaam mein vyast rehte hain. Unhe sirf khandaan ki shaan se matlab hai. Main toh bas is ghar ki ek maryada ban ke reh gayi hoon jiska apna koi astitva nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and weight of carrying this burden over time.
text: Itne lambe samay se aap is maryada ka bojh apne kandho par dho rahi hain ki ab aapko apna wajood hi khatam hota hua mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khatam hi ho gaya hai samajhiye. Mujhe samajh nahi aata ki kiske liye jee rahi hoon. Baccho ka chehra dekhti hoon toh lagta hai sab kuch unke liye theek hai. Par mera kya? Mujhe is sab par gussa bhi aata hai, par kisi se kuch keh nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the tension between her internal suppression and her role as a mother, reframing near-anger into an impossibility.
text: Andar ki is ghutan aur apne baccho ki parvarish ko bacha kar rakhne ke is sangharsh ke beech, aap khud ko kahan khada paati hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main toh jaise is ghar ki chaar deewari mein ekdum qaid hoon. Mera conflict yahi hai ki ek taraf mere bacche aur ye joint family ka naam hai, aur doosri taraf meri dabai hui identity jo ghut ghut ke mujhe maar rahi hai. Mera is duniya mein koi apna nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core feeling of ISOLATION specific to C6 and Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai is joint family ki itni badi bheed mein bhi, apne is sach aur identity ko poori tarah daba dene ki vajah se aap bohot gehra ISOLATION aur akelapan mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas muskurati rehti hoon
text: Aapne bilkul mere dil ki baat keh di. Bheed mein akelapan. Roz sabke sath khana khati hoon, poora din rasoi mein bitaati hoon, par kisi se apna sach nahi bol sakti. Apne aasu chupa leti hoon aur sabke samne bas muskurati rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her isolation as a culturally normal response to hiding her LGBTQ+ identity in a Hindi belt joint family context.
text: Jab ek maa apni sachchai chupakar khandaan ki maryada ke liye itna bada bojh uthati hai, toh ye akelepan ka ehsas hona bohot swabhavik hai. Hamare samaj aur joint families mein is tarah ka sach apnana asaan nahi hota, par iska bilkul ye matlab nahi ki aapka astitva galat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad. Par yahan hamari biradari mein aisi baaton ko itna ganda mana jata hai. Main apne baccho ke pyare naam ke aage ye 'kalank' nahi lagne de sakti. Isliye chupchap sehna hi ab meri aakhiri kismat ban chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a brief systemic anecdote highlighting that hiding identity for family peace is common but unspoken.
text: Joint families mein auraton ka is tarah apna wajood chupana bohot common hai—sirf aapka akeli ka sangharsh nahi hai ye, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki 'log kya kahenge' ka darr aur samaj ki izzat ka bojh har kisi ko khamosh kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Log kya kahenge, isi line ne toh hum sabko maar rakha hai. Main jaanti hoon ki aur bhi auratein shayad meri tarah andar se roti hongi, par unse kabhi milna ya apna sach batana mujhe mumkin nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hold the phase and mirror the feared consequence of never living her truth.
text: Kahin na kahin aapko lagta hai ki is dar aur rasoi ke farz ke bahar, aapko apna sach jeene ka mauka shayad kabhi mil hi nahi payega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aise nirash mehsoos hota hai. Par main waise hamesha ghut ghut ke qaid nahi rehna chahti. Thoda sa toh saans lene ki jagah aur azaadi chahiye mujhe bhi. Ab kya karoon main? Koi chota sa raasta hai kya theek mehsoos karne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide completable, low-stakes suggestions that fit within her strict household schedule.
text: Chaliye kuch aise chote kadam sochte hain jo aapke roz ke farz ko bina bigade fit ho jayein. Aap chahein toh dupahar mein 10 minute sirf apne akelepan ki dairy likh sakti hain, ya fir internet par kisi private support space mein anonymous jud sakti hain taaki dusron ke anubhav padh sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary likhna toh khatarnak ho sakta hai, agar galti se saas ke hath lag gayi toh ghar mein baawal ho jayega. Par mobile par internet wali baat theek lag rahi hai. Kamre mein thodi der akeli hoti hoon toh phone dekh sakti hoon, usmein anonymous kaise judein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the safest internet browsing step by step.
text: Sabse pehle apne phone mein ek aisi tab open karein jise baad mein turant band kiya ja sake, wahan ek nayi email id banayein jismein aapka asli naam na ho... phir internet par un forum ko sirf padhne ke liye kholen... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, history delete karna toh main thoda bahut jaanti hoon. Main ek nayi email bana kar siraf padhne ki koshish karungi. Kam se kam wahan ye toh pata chalega ki main akeli is 'paap' ki bhagidaar nahi hoon, balki meri tarah aur log bhi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe regarding the word 'paap', normalising her identity against societal control.
text: Yeh samajhna bohot zaroori hai ki jise aap lagatar 'paap' keh rahi hain, wo hamare traditional samaj ka banaya hua ek darr hai auraton ki identity control karne ke liye; isme aapka apna koi bhi niji dosh nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Identity control karne ke liye darr... Ye baat thodi badi aur naye dhang ki hai, par sunkar sachhi aur theek lagti hai. Agar auraton ko itni sachchai ki azaadi mil gayi toh khandaan ki maryada ka dar toh toot hi jayega. Abhi thoda dimag shant lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the release of long-held tension using Lens D.
text: Apne baare mein is tarah ek naye nazariye se sochne par lag raha hai ki saalon se daba hua identity ka bojh achanak thoda kam mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain. Bojh toh waise abhi bhi hai, kyunki bacche bhi abhi chote hain aur joint family ki dekhbhal toh karni hi hai. Par kam se kam ek chota sa raasta toh dikha jahan main akele mein thoda saans le saku bina kisiko dhoka diye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her resilience and brave step to find a safe space for herself.
text: Ek safe jagah talaash karne ki aapki ye koshish sachmuch aapki himmat aur us umeed ko dikhati hai jo itne paabandiyon ke beech bhi aapne zinda rakhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas muskurati rehti hoon
text: Wo umeed shayad isliye bachi hai kyunki andar thodi si zindagi baaki hai. Khair bacche bhi uthne wale honge shaam ke snacks ke liye. Main saara din ghar walon ke saamne bas muskurati rehti hoon, par kam se kam raat mein apne phone mein khud ko dhundhne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she is fulfilling her duty while finding a safe space (Lens B).
text: Apne baccho aur apni khushi, dono hi farzon ko aap ab samajhdari ke sath apne-apne daayre mein bacha kar rakhne ki taiyari kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dono zaroori hain. Ek raat mein toh mera aspas ka ye samaj badlega nahi, aur mujhe parivaar ki khatir yahin rehna hai. Par haan, apni us identity ko chupchap online space mein jarur ek jagah de paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about smart redirection and preserving identity invisibly.
text: Aksar aisi kathin sthiti mein, seedha muqabla karne ki jagah apne khayal aur sachchai ko aisi ek chhoti si gupt jagah mein surakshit rakhna hi auraton ki sabse badi samajhdari hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat mujhe himmat de rahi hai. Main is choti si gupt jagah ko apni hi duniya man kar khush rehne ka prayaas karungi. Abhi mujhe jaldi uthna chahiye, kaam poora karna hai rasoi ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift from hopelessness to facing the future without immense fear (Lens E).
text: Thodi si azaadi mehsoos karke lag raha hai ki jin anjaane tufaanon ka pehle darr tha, ab unko sambhal lene ka naya hausla jaag gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, ab utna dar nahi lag raha. Mujhse bina kisi taane ke baat karne aur mujhe theek tarah se sunne ke liye bahut bahut dhanyawad aapka. Mujhe iski sakht zaroorat thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength and understanding of her situation.
text: Mujhe aapki is nai himmat aur is dhairya par poora bharosa hai, jo is kathin mahol mein bhi aapko sambhalne ki takat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukriya. Main raat ko bilkul dhyaan se hi email aur browser wali chizein karungi. Agar aage chal kar mujhe kabhi bohot ghabrahat hui toh kya main wapas aapse baat kar sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the calming resolution and safety found (Lens D).
text: Is naye nazariye se ab aapko pichle kayi dino ki wo purani ghabrahat kafi samay tak dur rehne ki umeed lagne lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wo ghabrahat zarur theek hogi. Main koshish karungi ki khush reh saku. Ab mujhe chalna chahiye. Apna khayal rakhiyega aur mere sath wakt bitaane ka shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide warm final closing confirming ongoing availability.
text: Aapki is yatra mein hum humesha maujood hain, kabhi bhi jab aapka mann ho baat karne ka, hum yahin rahenge, aap bhi apna ache se khayal rakhein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi
text: Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi kyunki parivaar se badhkar kuch nahi hai. Saas ki caregiving mein itni exhaust ho chuki hoon ki main us wedding ka hissa nahi ban saki jahan mere community ke log thay, aur ab ye 'lost identity' mujhe kha rahi hai. Main ghar mein koi vivaad nahi chahti isliye divorce stigma ke darr se chup rehti hoon aur ek sanskari bahu ka kirdaar nibhati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational burden of suppressing her identity to avoid family conflict using Lens C.
text: Apne parivaar ko kisi bhi vivaad se door rakhne ke khatir aapne apni khud ki pehchaan ko bilkul bhula diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi
text: Haan, agar maine apni is thakaan ke baare mein kuch bhi kaha toh divorce stigma aur taane shuru ho jayenge. Main bas chup rehti hoon. Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi, kyunki auraton ke liye ghar tootna sabse badi badnaami hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to gently name the feared consequence of societal taunts, keeping it short due to the stigma cue.
text: Samaj ke taano aur us badnaami ke darr se aap apni har takleef chupchap sehti ja rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sehna hi padta hai. Subah uthne se lekar raat tak sirf saas ki dawai, khana, aur unki sewa. Meri apni koi marzi nahi bachi. Ek 'sanskari bahu' ko toh bas bina shiqayat kiye duties poori karni hoti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the continuous duration and exhaustion of her daily routine.
text: Din bhar lagataar chalne wali in anant zimmedariyon ke beech, aapko mehsoos hone laga hai ki aapki azaadi kahin kho gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi
text: Kho hi gayi hai na. Kabhi kabhi bahut rona aata hai, par aansu dikhaungi toh naya kalesh shuru ho jayega. Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi, yahi meri aakhiri sachai ban chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of isolation that arises from preserving family honor at the cost of her identity.
text: Lagta hai in saari duties aur 'sanskari bahu' banne ke is bhaari dabaav ke andar, aap ek bohot gehri ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapka dard bantne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Isolation hi hai ye. Ghar bhara hua hai rishtedaron se, phir bhi main bilkul akeli hoon. Saas ki sewa karna theek hai, par uske chakkar mein mujhe apni zindagi bhulani padegi, ye kisi ne nahi bataya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings of loneliness as culturally normal for homemakers under heavy family expectations.
text: Ek homemaker ke taur par lagataar caregiving karna aur parivaar ki izzat bachaye rakhna bohot bada bojh hai, aur isme thakaan ya akelapan mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai; ye takleef aapke parivaar ke prati samarpan ko kam nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samarpan toh poora hai, par logo ko sirf tab tak theek lagta hai jab tak aurat jhukti rahe. Agar maine thoda sa bhi aaram manga toh biradari mein batein banengi ki 'bahu kaam chor hai' aur phir wahi badnaami ka darr sataiga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the sacrifice she makes to protect the family from taunts, responding to the stigma cue with a pause.
text: Biradari ki unn kadwi baaton aur taanon se apne parivaar ko bachane ke liye aap khud par hi sakhti kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sakhti toh karni padegi. Main kalesh nahi jhel sakti. Saari zindagi yehi sochte nikal jayegi ki doosre kya kahenge, par main apne parivaar ko sharminda hote nahi dekh sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote about the invisible burden on women to maintain peace.
text: Grahaniyon mein apni takleef ko daba kar ghar shaant rakhne ka ye bhaari bojh uthana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka ye haal nahi hai, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki humare samaj mein auraton se bas tyag ki hi umeed ki jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye tyag karte karte main sach mein is 'lost identity' wali state mein aagayi hoon. Main aur nahi ghutna chahti. Mujhe bas thodi shanti chahiye... ab kya karoon main samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable options that fit her homemaker duties and need for quietness.
text: Aise mein hum thodi si raahat nikalne ki koshish kar sakte hain. Pehla, kya aap din mein 10 minute akele chhat par thehal sakti hain? Ya phir, jab aap pooja ghar mein diya jalati hain, tab 5 minute sirf khud ki shanti ke liye wahan akele baith sakti hain? Dono mein se kya aasan rahega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhat par jana theek nahi lagega, saas poochhengi kahan ja rahi hai. Par pooja ke waqt, jab main diya jalati hoon, wahan thodi der akele baith sakti hoon. Wahan koi shakk nahi karega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her step-by-step through the pooja room suggestion.
text: Pehle pooja ke paas aaram se baith jao… phir aankhein band karke sirf do lambi saansein lo bina kisi ghar ki fikar kiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi
text: Haan, ye choti si cheez main kar sakti hoon. Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi, par shayad mandir ke saamne main asliyat mein thodi der saans le paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the small solitary moments as essential for preserving her identity within systemic constraints.
text: Jab parivaar aur samaj ke niyam itne bhaari ho jate hain, toh ye chhote-chhote 5 minute ke akelepan ke hisse sirf aaram nahi, balki apni us dabi hui pehchaan ko zinda rakhne ka ek zaroori hissa hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zinda rehna zaroori hai. Warna main andar se poori khokhli ho jaungi. Mujhe yaad bhi nahi ki maine aakhiri baar chain ki saans kab li thi bina agle kaam ka soche.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to reflect the duty-bound nature of her constant focus on others.
text: Gharwalo ki zarooraton aur har ek farz ko sabse aage rakhte rakhte, aapne apne khud ke aaram ko bohot peeche chhod diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Peeche hi choot gaya sab. Kal ek relative ke yahan shadi thi, main wahan bhi nahi ja payi. Ab koi purana dost phone bhi kare toh lagta hai kya baat karun us se?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational distance and resulting loneliness.
text: Un purane doston ke door hone se aapko apni is char-diwari ki zindagi mein aur bhi zyada akelepan ka saamna karna pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ek darr sa lagta hai ki wo doston ki azaad zindagi dekh kar mera mann niraash na ho jaye. Unki baatein sunungi toh aur zyada 'lost' feel hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of engaging with the outside world.
text: Aapko is baat ki ghabrahat hoti hai ki bahar ki duniya aur azaadi dekhne se aapke andar ki dabi hui ghutan kahin aur na badh jaye...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul! Ghar ki shanti sabse upar hai. Agar mera mann thoda bhi bhatka toh kalesh hoga aur us se bachchon par asar padega. Isliye isolation hi theek hai mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her isolation as a structural consequence of societal expectations rather than personal failure.
text: Bachchon aur parivaar ki shanti ko apne astitva se upar rakhne ka ye dabaav humari paramparaon mein auraton par itna zyada hai ki ye ghutan dhire-dhire aadat jaisi ban jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aadat toh ban hi gayi hai. Chuppi mein hi meri aur sabki bhalai hai. Par ab main mandir wale akelepan ko le kar thodi aasha rakh rahi hoon. Sayad wahan rone se dil thoda toh halka hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the release found in those few minutes.
text: Lekin ab pooja ke us thode se waqt mein aap aakhir kaar apne inn rukay hue ansuon aur jazbaaton ko behne ka ek chhota sa kinara zaroor de payengi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kabhi kabhi bas ye chahti hoon ki koi puche ki main sach mein kaisi hoon. Bina kisi umeed, bina kisi duty ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect the deep relational longing for unconditional care.
text: Sabki itni parwah karte karte, ab aapka ye thaka hua dil kisi aise insaan ka intezaar karta hai jo bina kisi farz ke sirf aapki takleef sune...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yehi ek choti si umeed bachi hai. Aapne aaj meri baatein bina mujhe galat thehraye suni, is se bohot himmat mili hai. Kam se kam main andar hi andar pagal toh nahi ho rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her sanity and strength in navigating extreme cultural and family pressures.
text: Aap bilkul bhi pagal nahi hain, balki itne mushkil parivaarik mahaul aur taanon ke dar ke beech bhi sabko sambhalna aur apni sanjeedagi banaye rakhna aapki bohot badi taqat hai, bhale hi abhi iski kadar na ho rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Main abhi chalkar pooja ghar mein baithti hoon. Saas abhi so rahi hain, toh akele baithne ka aur do saans lene ka accha waqt hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to summarize her shift from family duties to finding her own small space.
text: Sabke aaram aur zimmedariyon ke is chote se interval mein, aakhir kaar aaj aapne apne khud ke sukoon ke liye ek raasta chun hi liya...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi
text: Chunna hi padega. Warna rishto ki garima bachane ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dungi, par main andar se zinda bhi toh rehna chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight her courage in preserving her identity despite her duties.
text: Parivaar ko tootne se bachane ke us farz ko nibhate hue bhi, ab aap apne wajood ko sambhalne aur bachane ki koshish kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, koshish toh jari rakhni hogi. Ab main jaati hoon mandir ki taraf. Aapse baat karke seene ka bojh sach mein halka hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to conclude the session by affirming the release found after a long duration of stress.
text: In lambe aur thaka dene wale lagataar dino ke baad, aaj apne dil ka wo bojh thoda sa kam karke aapne khud ke liye apna pehla kadam aage badhaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon
text: Shaadi mein na ja paane ka dard toh hai, par usse bada bojh ye hai ki main kabhi apne asli roop mein sasural walon ke samne nahi aa sakti. Agar maine sacchai batayi toh log kahenge ki career gap mein bahu bigad gayi hai, isliye main chupchap wahi karti hoon jo ek ideal aurat ko karna chahiye. Unka sar uncha rahe, bas isiliye main apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice of hiding her true self to maintain the family's honor.
text: Ghar ki izzat aur sasural walon ki nazron mein sahi bane rehne ke liye aapne khud ko puri tarah se dabakar rakh diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi sach hai. Pura din sabki sewa karna, sasural ki expectations meet karna, aur andar hi andar ghutna. Mera career gap badhta ja raha hai, aur ab toh lagta hai main sirf ek 'ideal bahu' banke reh gayi hoon, mera apna koi wajood hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly name the implied fear of losing her identity completely to the family role.
text: Is baat ka darr andar hi andar kha raha hai ki is 'ideal bahu' ke dhache mein aapki apni pehchaan hamesha ke liye mit jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon
text: Ye darr nahi, reality ban chuki hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod doon, par 'izzat' ka kya? Biradari mein sab baatein banayenge. Us dar se main chup rehti hoon aur bas apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol with a short time-lens restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Rozana is ghutan ko akele hi itne waqt se sehna sach mein bohut bhari ho gaya hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut bhari lagta hai ab. Career gap ki wajah se wapas job pe bhi nahi ja sakti. Sasural mein sab kehte hain ki aurat ghar mein hi theek lagti hai. Par meri asliyat kisi ko nahi pata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to explore what her buried self wants to say.
text: Jab aap sabki umeedein puri karne mein lagi rehti hain, toh andar chhipi wo 'asliyat' aapse kya kehti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se aawaz aati hai ki main ye sab kiske liye kar rahi hoon? Meri khud ki pasand, mere apne sapne kahan gaye? Par jab saas-sasur ki taraf dekhti hoon, toh duty yaad aati hai ki bahu ka dharam nibhana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame that forces her to bury her own dreams.
text: Bahu hone ka dharam aur farz ka bojh itna bada hai ki usne aapke apne sapno aur aawaz ko bilkul dabakar rakh diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Dab gaye hain mere sapne. Ab toh apne hi aine mein khud ko dekhti hoon toh parayi si lagti hoon. Sasural bhara hua hai rishtedaron se, par is poore ghar mein mera apna koi nahi hai jisse main apne dil ki baat keh saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the profound isolation felt within the family structure.
text: Lagta hai ki is bhare poore parivaar ke beech hote hue bhi, aap gehri isolation ka shikar ho gayi hain, jahan sach mein aapko samajhne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul akele pad gayi hoon main. Din bhar dusron ke liye sar uncha rakhne ki acting karti hoon. Kisi ko pata bhi nahi main andar se kitni khokli ho chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the isolation as a cultural consequence of prioritizing family izzat over a woman's identity.
text: Aapka ye akelepan mehsoos karna bilkul lazmi hai; humari society mein aksar ghar ki izzat ke naam par auraton se unki pehchaan chheen li jati hai, aur is ghutan mein aapki koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon
text: Ye sun kar thoda sukoon mila ki meri galti nahi hai. Main hamesha khud ko kosti thi ki shayad main hi kharab aurat hoon jo khush nahi reh pa rahi. Par rozana is dhong mein, apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about homemakers facing identity loss due to cultural pressure.
text: Ghar ko sambhalne wali auraton mein apni pehchaan bhool jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka sangharsh nahi hai, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki 'ideal bahu' banne ka pressure sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Sab chup hain. Par is chuppi ne mujhe marne ke kagaar pe la diya hai. Ab aage kya karoon? Mujhe theek hona hai, thoda sa hi sahi, koi raasta hai kya is suffocation se nikalne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggest two low-effort, private actions that fit into her homemaker routine.
text: Kuch chhote aur asaan kadam utha sakte hain jo aapke sasural ke farzon ko disturb nahi karenge. Pehla, din mein jab sab apne kamo mein vyast hon, toh 10 minute akele mein ek personal diary mein apne asli vichaar likhein jo koi aur na padhe. Dusra, aap koi anonymous online women's support community mein message kar sakti hain jahan identity chupayi ja sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Online support community wala idea theek lag raha hai. Diary toh ghar mein chhipana mushkil hai, saas kabhi bhi room mein aa jati hain safai ke bahane. Phone pe main at least chat delete kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the first immediate step of finding the online community.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal dopahar mein jab thoda free time mile, toh apne phone par kisi aisi safe anonymous app ko dhundo aur bas ek naya account bana kar dekh lo… phir aage badhna, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dopahar ko jab saas so jati hain, tab main ye kar sakti hoon. Itna chhota sa step hai, par soch kar hi thodi ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki kahin kisi ko pata chal gaya toh kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe to normalize the anxiety of claiming personal space.
text: Nayi cheez shuru karne par ghabrahat hona natural hai kyunki hamesha sikhaya gaya hai ki aurat ka apna koi waqt nahi hota; khud ke liye choti si jagah banana koi saazish nahi, balki system se apne hisse ki saans mangna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: System se saans mangna... ye baat dil ko lagi. Hamesha yahi sikhaya gaya tha ki apna bare mein sochna selfishness hai. Par ab agar thodi saans nahi li, toh main bacha hi nahi paungi khud ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift from pure duty to recognizing the necessity of self-preservation.
text: Apne aapko puri tarah se khatam hone se bachane ke liye, ab aapne is 'selfishness' wale taane se aage badhkar khud ko zinda rakhne ki zaroorat ko pehchan liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Zinda rakhna hi hoga. Career toh gap mein kho gaya, par wajood ko zinda rakhna hai. Bahar wahi ideal bahu wali life chalti rahegi, par ab main ek corner mein apni sachai rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a second systemic reframe validating the heavy cost of gender roles and separating her identity from them.
text: Jahan auraton ki mehnat ko sirf farz bol kar dismiss kar diya jata hai, wahan apne khud ke wajood ke liye ladna gender roles ki janjiron ke khilaf ek mazboot kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon
text: Mazboot kadam... Pehli baar kisine mere struggle ko strength bola hai. Aaj tak toh bas ye lagta tha ki main kamzor hoon jo adjust nahi kar pa rahi. Apni soul ka qatal har din karti hoon, bas ye guilty feeling nahi jaati thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her inner strength and resilience in surviving these relational pressures.
text: Aapki is ladaai aur bardasht karne ki taqat ko aaj tak kisi ne dekha hi nahi; aap kamzor nahi hain, balki itne kathor riwazon ke beech khud ko thoda sa bhi bacha kar rakhna aapki asli taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Ye sunkar aankhon mein aansu aa gaye. Thoda halka lag raha hai ab seene mein. Kam se kam main pagal nahi hoon, ye saaf ho gaya mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the physical relief from the long-standing emotional burden.
text: Itne lambe arse se jo ghutan ek bojh bankar aapke seene par baithi thi, wo aaj akhirkar thodi si pighal kar halki mehsoos ho rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut pighal gayi hai. Dopahar ko account banaungi, online community mein baat karungi. Wahan koi sar uncha rakhne ka natak nahi karna padega mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about her emotional anticipation for entering that judgment-free space.
text: Us naye azaad maahol mein, jahan koi natak ya ummeedon ka daera nahi hoga, wahan apne aap se milna kaisa mehsoos hoga aapko?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagega jaise saalon baad main khud ko aine mein dekh rahi hoon. Ek azaad aurat, jo sirf kisi ki bahu nahi hai, uski apni aawaz hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the freedom derived from shedding the relational role.
text: Dusron ki nazron ka aaina hata kar, apne aap ko sirf ek azaad insaan ke roop mein swikar karna, bina kisi saas-sasur ki umeedon ke, apne aap mein ek nai pehchaan hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Yahi nai pehchaan mujhe roz zinda rehne ki takat degi. Unka sar bhi uncha rahega, aur mera safar bhi jaari rahega andar hi andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her maturity in balancing outward expectations with inner self-preservation.
text: Ghar walo ka farz aur apni andar ki aawaz dono ko is itminaan se balance karna sikhna aapki samajhdari ko darshata hai, jiski jitni tareef ki jaye kam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bina judge kiye itne aaram se meri baat suni, isiliye main clear soch paayi. Warna main ghutan se pagal hi ho rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the fear of a breakdown has transformed into clarity.
text: Andar se toot jane aur pagalpan ke jis darr ne aapko ghair rakha tha, uski jagah ab ek shant aur clear soch ne le li hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me, ab dimaag shant hai. Main kal se apna naya online safar shuru karungi chori chhupe hi sahi. Apna dhyaan rakhne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a final validation of her courage to start this new journey.
text: Apne safar ki is nayi shuruaat mein meri puri support aapke sath hai; ye chupke se banayi hui duniya aapki asli himmat banegi.
